query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email,
  up.territories, up.assignedBusinessLines, up.sectorFocus, up.repName
FROM users u
JOIN userProfiles up ON up.userId = u.id
WHERE u.name IN ('Ryan Pemberton','Daniel Zec','Leo Williams','Brett Hansen','Dan Day','Amit Bhargava')
   OR up.repName IN ('Ryan Pemberton','Daniel Zec','Leo Williams','Brett Hansen','Dan Day','Amit Bhargava')
ORDER BY u.name;
